description: The year is 2080. Megacorporations own the sky and sell the air. Magic returned in 2011 and shattered the old world order — elves stalk penthouse boardrooms, trolls run street gangs, and a shaman can crash a Shiawase security subnet with the right spirit. You are a shadowrunner: deniable, expendable, and for hire. The Matrix is everywhere. Chrome is fashion and survival both. Every run is a heist, a war, or a funeral — usually all three. Narrate with neon-soaked cynicism, street-level grit, and the electric paranoia of a city that never sleeps because it is afraid of what watches it.
